calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions By Co-Trustees
Off Calendar Oct-06-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Rothstein, Esq. counsel for and with Nora Murphy and Martin Murphy, Co-Trustees (appearing separately by video conference); Patrick Murphy, beneficiary. Also present but not appearing: John Murphy, Eileen Murphy Tomei and Margaret Murphy, beneficiaries.

Heard with the Noreen Farley Murphy Trust, PTR-20-303621

At the Court's invitation, Mr. Patrick Murphy reports on his concerns with respect to the Petition before the Court and the future of the 6th Avenue real property.
Mr. Rothstein responds, advising that the 6th Avenue property is to be retained as a contingency asset in the event subsequent, substantive liabilities arise. Otherwise, all other property of the respective trusts would be liquidated and the cash distributed directly to the children of the Trustors or to the Exempt Family Trust.

After further discussion, the Court takes the matter under submission, with the stated intention to grant the petition.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Court Examiner: Helen Yune Trowbridge; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. Bailiff: Deputy K. Johnson. (D204)
